description: Letter from Avraham b. Ya'akov in Jerusalem to his son in Fustat. Around 1040, in the handwriting of Moshe b. Yitzhak from the Karaite community. (Probably the father and son belong to the Karaite community as well). The father describes his difficult situation after the death of another son and because of his illness and his need for money and asks his son for help. (Information from Gil, Palestine corrections, Mehkarim be-Mada'e ha-Yahadut, Te'udah 7, pp. 326-327). VMR
tags: isolation, grief, illness: poverty, Qaraite, Illness, 11th c, illness letter 969-1517, illness: housebound, iftiqad, illness: threatening to die
description_he: מכתב מאברהם בן יעקב בירושלים לבנו בפוסטאט, כ-1040, בכתב קראי. האב מתאר מצבו הקשה לאחר מות בן אחר ובגלל מחלתו, ומבקש עזרה כספית.
